name: Enterprise Azure Hybrid Data platform
desc: End-to-end Azure Data Engineering solution featuring SHIR-based hybrid pipelines, ADLS Gen2 lakehouse, Databricks (PySpark), Synapse SQL, and Power BI analytics

name: Fabric Lakehouse Analytics Solution
desc: Built an end-to-end analytics pipeline using Microsoft Fabric, featuring API ingestion, PySpark Lakehouse transformations, and Power BI dashboards

name: Azure Retail Data Platform
desc: Built a cloud-based Azure Data Engineering platform leveraging Medallion Architecture, scalable Spark processing, Delta Lake transformations, and Power BI analytics

name: Microsoft Fabric HR Analytics Data Platform
desc: End-to-end Data Engineering project built using Microsoft Fabric to ingest, transform, and analyze HR data from Azure Data Lake Storage using a Lakehouse architecture and Dataflow Gen2, delivering workforce attrition insights through Power BI dashboards
